epigraph.quote: Simon woke me very early to roll over + look at the mist on the lake. It was very beautiful.

per_stop.quote: The trafic + cars in the waiting area at the Channel Tunnel were lighter than usual.
The lake was stipled with rain while we had breakfast
We visited the wrong big church first + then found the Basilica. Its onomous + vertical.
had a walk over chalk fields!
We bought a la Reine pizza for lunch which was good
It's a good campsite - town & shops, restaurant & bike trail (Canal de Bourgogne) & free swimming.
It's one of the best places I've seen. Now lived in by the Montgolfier (Balloon descendants) family.
We arrived at Ste Marie sur l'Ouche & hung the washing & it dried. The weather is now warmer & it's not threatening rain.
We reached an unusual campsite, a bit like Center Parks, around gravel pits
It's an old Mediaeval town, very pretty.
I got out of bed + into the pool + washed my hair.
Simon has downloaded Russian military maps off the internet.
At about 2 pm we stopped at Abbeville, outside the old address of au pair Florence. Her mother invited us in.
So odd that the Chinese Labour Corps were treated as prisoners, but have a magnificent Lutyens graveyard
It was crowded + the people were quite rough but friendly.
It took only 12 mins to the booking-in place + we caught a train 2 before our booked one.
we looked at this good campsite for staying with William + Joseph in the autumn
